warnings: Bundle size warnings (editor: 346 KiB, screen: 380 KiB) - expected and acceptable

syncStatus.notes: TSX/PHP sync maintained. The PHP-specific fixes (aria-label fallback and heading id) are handled differently in the editor by useBlockProps, so no TSX changes needed. HTML structure remains identical.

fixesApplied.issue: Missing aria-label fallback on section when heading is empty
fixesApplied.fix: Added second argument to theme_block_props() with aria-label fallback: empty( $heading ) ? 'aria-label="' . esc_attr__( 'Social Media Links', 'takt' ) . '"' : ''

fixesApplied.issue: Missing id attribute on h2 heading for aria-labelledby reference
fixesApplied.fix: Added id="<?php echo esc_attr( theme_block_region_id() ); ?>" to h2 element so theme_block_props auto-generated aria-labelledby can reference it

implementationNotes: Both fixes align with patterns used in other blocks (GalleryCarousel, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel, DynamicContentCarousel)
theme_block_props() auto-adds aria-labelledby pointing to {block-id}-heading when heading attribute is non-empty
When heading is empty, the fallback aria-label ensures the section has an accessible name
The heading id attribute matches the auto-generated aria-labelledby reference
TSX does not need these changes - useBlockProps handles aria attributes differently in the editor
HTML structure sync verified - both TSX and PHP produce identical DOM structure
